label: B-2 Spirit Stealth Bomber
caption: B-2 Spirit dropping ordnance. Seven flew round-trip from Diego Garcia (~13,000 km) requiring 52 tankers.

label: GBU-57 Massive Ordnance Penetrator
caption: GBU-57A/B MOP — 30,000 lb, Eglin steel alloy casing. Fordow required 12 (vs 2 at Natanz).

label: Natanz — Satellite Pre-Strike
caption: Pre-strike satellite imagery of Iranian nuclear enrichment infrastructure. Natanz houses centrifuge halls ~8m underground with reinforced concrete.

label: F-35I Adir — Primary Strike Platform
caption: F-35I Adir — Israeli customized variant with indigenous avionics. Low-observable design penetrated Iran's S-300 network.
source: Israeli Air Force / Wikimedia Commons (public domain)

label: S-300 Battery — Neutralized
caption: S-300PMU2 batteries could not track the F-35I at combat altitude — rendered effectively blind by stealth.

label: ESA Sentinel-2 — Commercial Satellite (Detection Method)
caption: Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery (10m resolution). OSINT analysts cross-referenced AIS gaps with satellite data to confirm the vessel's classified mission profile days before the operation launched.

label: USS Lake Erie (CG-70) — Ticonderoga-class Cruiser Escort
caption: USS Lake Erie (CG-70) assigned as protective escort for MV Ocean Trader.

label: MH-60 SOF Helicopter Insertion
caption: MH-60 Black Hawk variant used for SOF insertion from the Ocean Trader to the Caracas target.

label: SOF Helicopter Raid — Caracas Insertion
caption: SOF forces inserted by helicopter from the MV Ocean Trader staging platform. Zero US casualties.

label: Tomahawk VLS Launch — Arleigh Burke DDG
caption: Tomahawk Block IV launch from Vertical Launch System. 13 Arleigh Burke DDGs contributed to the 900+ strike opening salvo.

label: HIMARS — PrSM Launch Platform
caption: US Army HIMARS firing from Kuwait. PrSM made its combat debut from these platforms, demonstrating 499+ km range.

label: JDAM Bunker Strike Munition
caption: GBU-31 Joint Direct Attack Munition loaded in a B-2 Spirit — precision guidance kit for bunker targeting. CIA penetration enabled location of Khamenei's underground bunker.

label: Shahed-136 Kamikaze Drone
caption: Shahed-136 loitering munition — one of 541 drones in the 708-munition barrage. ~$20,000 each vs. $4M for a Patriot PAC-3 interceptor.

label: Patriot PAC-3 Intercept
caption: Patriot PAC-3 missile intercept. The layered GCC + US defense architecture intercepted all 708 munitions.

label: PLAN Shandong (CV-17) — Type 001A Carrier
caption: PLA Navy carrier in South China Sea operations.

label: Fiery Cross Reef — PLAN Artificial Island Base
caption: Fiery Cross Reef artificial island — 3,000m runway, hardened aircraft shelters, SAM/CDCM batteries.
source: CSIS AMTI / Planet Labs satellite imagery

label: China Coast Guard (CCG) Vessel
caption: China Coast Guard vessel — primary gray-zone coercion tool.

label: BRP Sierra Madre — Philippine Military Outpost
caption: BRP Sierra Madre (AT-43) — a deliberately grounded WWII-era LST serving as the Philippines' military outpost on Second Thomas Shoal.

label: USS Arleigh Burke DDG — FONOP Platform
caption: Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer — the primary US Navy platform for SCS FONOP operations.

label: Mischief Reef — CSIS AMTI Satellite (2025)
caption: PLA artificial island base — Mischief Reef, 250km from Palawan, Philippine EEZ.
source: CSIS AMTI / Planet Labs (public satellite imagery)

label: H-6K Nuclear-Capable Bomber — PLAAF
caption: PLAAF H-6K Xian bomber — nuclear-capable platform in the 103-aircraft ADIZ incursion.
